reviews.review_title: Bigger numbers is not a bigger game
reviews.review_description: I wanted to like this game. Despite this, the game is completely out of playable content after 3 levels. The bosses are just bigger versions of normal enemies. The higher floors do nothing but raise enemy health. I know that this game is not some big title, but I can't excuse the level of jank and glitchiness that occurs. Pot fragments have collision so you get stuck when you break them, enemies get stuck in walls constantly, the bosses don't actually have to be fought. You can just stand back and shoot. I would give more constructive feedback, but just playing the game normally for ten minutes exposes so many easy to fix issues that I can't say in good faith that the developer actually cares.

This has the potential to be ancient but for people who don’t want mindcraft graphics and  possibly more. One thing these dungeon crawls are missing is co op. But it really hope this game continues to develop, it’s I’m my list to watch. Keep them updates coming, listen to your player base. But most importantly, co op. Get some lore/stats/skills follow you between deaths, or the gold you acquire to allow you to upgrade your character, maybe a skill tree allowing people to mold the character as they please. This is one of the best new dungeon crawls I’ve seen. I haven’t found anything since until you fall that I’m even remotely happy with (not really a dungeon crawl) but some good dungeon design/character customization and COOP/ lore / this could be the next big thing. I really believe that. Unfortunately in VR we see way to many engines with slight mods and get abandoned. Don’t do that to this, if you can get some of the stuff I suggested it’ll be a 25$ game easy. Keep trucking guys

reviews.review_title: Great game! One word of advice.....
reviews.review_description:
Immediately as the game starts press the left home button and select free movement as teleport is awful. 

However, fun as hell game! Love the cartoon graphics style and some monsters actually made me jump!! It's a bit like a less scary version of dreadhalls. 

In a future update could you put a map? Got a bit lost for a free game it's great so you can't complain, but if you do major updates. I would happily pay for this.

I really enjoyed Mythic Mage. It's a good "dungeon crawler" style game. It has a surprising amount of enemy variety (although I didn't play for a long time, so perhaps they get old). The controls were simple to learn and overall a good experience.

In any case, I had a fun time and will be playing again!

developer_response.body: I'm glad that you enjoyed the game!

reviews.review_description: This game is a lot of fun,    So in the settings there is an option for free locomotion just so you know.

developer_response.body: Thanks for letting people know. I made this more clear in the tutorial now! I'm glad you enjoy the game.

reviews.review_description: Best way to describe this title is if Dreadhalls had a child with In Death, with a mix of cell shading. I do agree about the free movement, but actually enjoy the teleport orb you throw. You can overhand it down the hallways. Pretty fun.

UPDATE: 8/20/2022 and I still play this a lot... 

Still playing this... I am hoping developers keep checking this review and keep doing updates for the game...

It IS frustrating to get to like level 27 or so and then die... BUT... I still enjoy chucking energy orbs at the enemies...

Once again, how about some updates? Different looking dungeons (they all still look the same after 20 or so levels), different looking enemies (how about some scorpions, bats, maybe some devils or demons, flesh eating blobs, I got suggestions for DAYS)...

Still a bit of issue with two projectiles colliding (you can't throw a projectile at the place you already destroyed an enemy projectile), but other than that and maybe adding some new weapons this game could use a little TLC... Still very enjoyable, and hopefully we haven't seen the last of newer updates... PLEASE don't abandon this game!


Keep the updates coming, and I'll keep playing!!

It is one of the best Applab games out there! I got it when it was free, but I still feel like it would have been worth the $10. There are a good variety of enemies, the teleporting, swords, and magic take skill to use. It is an overall great game.

Sometimes I get scared, but still really fun!
Also you should be able to revive with 500 coins or more.

As a work in progress, my primary complaint is that the sound mix needs the most work.  I would ditch the background music for the time being and really work on the ambient sounds of the dungeon.  I got killed too many times by cheap shots from creatures that I should have heard coming up behind me.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! I replaced the music with ambiance sound and made sure that all the enemies make a sound so that you can react before they are able to attack you.

reviews.review_title: Makes you feel like a wizard
reviews.review_description:
Honestly... Impressed! Its a really fun game with randomized areas so you'll never get a same run. And it's challenging as it is good to play. 

The art style is amazing, The feel of the game is amazing, and the monsters are varied and scary!

I would like to see a map in the future as well as adding more weapons you can find / maybe buy? But its a great game already and I highly recommend getting it.
Love me self a good dungeon crawler, makes you feel proper wizard like. Absolutely smashing game would give it 6 stars if I could even though I ain't played it.

Absolute fun. So much fun. I think there should be a couple more things to run into besides vases. Maybe throw in a type of puzzle here and there or a change up in colors on different levels. Something to show change in levels. Hell, other than that it's super fun and I definitely recommend. A must have. Again absolutely love it.

I love sense of scale in VR, boy its magical and this game does it wonderfully, I cant wait to see what else the future holds for this title, I believe someone suggested co-op... that would be incredible.

reviews.review_title: The game ends when you die.
reviews.review_description:
If you die, you have to start over from the beginning.
Adventures are very monotonous and long, so it's hard.
The hit check between the attack and the wall is too large, which can cancel or make the attack unreachable.
The atmosphere is good, but it needs improvement.

developer_response.body: Sorry that you didn't enjoy your experience. The game restarting when you die is an important part of the game design, so I won't change it at this point. The layout of the dungeons will be different every time you play. Thanks for reporting that the hit check between the attack and the wall is too big. This was fixed in the last update. I'm glad you found the atmosphere good. How do you think I can improve it? Thanks for taking your time to leave a review.

reviews.review_title: Quite far from a great game
reviews.review_description: The environment are very simple, enemies not so entertaining. Don't like very much the graphics and the upgrade shop. But there's potential... hope for a great development.
I got this thinking ugh, another poorly made game. I was wrong. It actually has a good system, and you can tell what you are against by levels. So get it, it's worth a play!

i would love to see this game improved. all thats bad is really the sfx and graphics. please add a use for coins though. i would suggest sword drag and better walls i will update this reveiw as the game develops
very fun dont let your initial thoughts about the graphics stop you
Very good but I forget in can move and crouch irl
